candidateReviewRules: Use API data as research input, not final article copy.
Select products by reader fit, value-for-money, tradeoffs, and skip-if criteria.
Do not copy product detail page text, reviews, or product-page images.
Mention price or delivery details only when checked near publishing time and with non-permanent wording.

selectedProducts.label: Situation-based CTA label
selectedProducts.recommendedFor: Reader situation where this product is useful
selectedProducts.valueForMoney: Why this is reasonable for the likely price range
selectedProducts.skipIf: Reader situation where this is not a good fit
